problem id: 629b09d1
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(7)

examples:
  10011110 -> 01001111
  00110111 -> 10011011
  00000011 -> 10000001
  01011101 -> 10101110
  10111011 -> 11011101
  01011011 -> 10101101
  01001000 -> 00100100
  11110111 -> 11111011
  01110110 -> 00111011
  01100110 -> 00110011

query: 01110100
predicted answer: 00111010
